name: Saviynt Memberships With Missing Groups
description: Detects orphaned saviynt memberships referencing groups that no longer exist.
query: SELECT m.group_id, m.user_id FROM saviynt_group_memberships m LEFT JOIN saviynt_groups g ON m.group_id = g.id WHERE m.group_id IS NOT NULL AND g.id IS NULL
remediation: Remove orphaned memberships and reconcile all references to deleted or migrated groups.
